no: place the Detection component after your subrace mod. Not needed with ToF though Returning Bioware characters none of these recognize returning characters by Lava, like Khalid [Branwen BG2 placeholder] Mainly written as a tutorial for modders REINSTALL BUG: %EDWIN30%.wav unresolved variable on reinstall. ALWAYS block variable not preserved. First install succeeds.
sum: Expands Alora with new dialogue and interactions beyond her brief vanilla BG1 appearance.

co.n: Chosen of Mystra's Alora NPC Mod (Requires Throne of Bhaal)
co.no: UPSTREAM BUG: fatesp.d parse error. gw_dlg_functions.tpa searches FATESP.DLG for the string matching fatesp_string (@65010, Aerie line). If that string is not found (e.g. Aerie not in this EET phase), variables fatesp_state_alora and fatesp_transition_alora remain -99, causing a parse error when EVALUATE_BUFFER compiles fatesp.d. Install after Chosen of Mystra or ensure the Aerie fatesp line exists in FATESP.DLG.
